title: Dowdow #1734
definition:
Dodo = "his beloved"

 1) a man of the tribe of Issachar
 2) a man of Bethlehem, father of Elhanan who was one of David's
    30 captains
 3) an Ahohite, father of Eleazar, the second of the 3 mighty men
    who were over the 30
nasbUsage:
